results.description: THE CONTRACTOR SHALL DEVELOP AND DELIVER A CONCEPT AND AN INTERFACE SPECIFICATION FOR TOWING, COMMUNICATING, AND POWERING SUBMERGED VEHICLES FROM A SUBMARINE PLATFORM TO SUPPORT DESIGN OF THE NEXT-GENERATION ATTACK SUBMARINE (SSN(X)).
